metadata.title: Ivo Šmerek — Programmer & Designer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Ivo Šmerek. 10+ years crafting web experiences with TypeScript and Python. Based in Olomouc, Czech Republic.
metadata.ogDescription: 10+ years crafting web experiences with TypeScript and Python.

hero.subtitle: Programmer & Designer
hero.description: Crafting web experiences for over a decade.
hero.descriptionLine2: TypeScript and Python — from Olomouc to the world.

about.title: About
about.intro: I'm a programmer and designer with
about.introEnd: building web applications that people actually enjoy using.
about.education: I hold both a Bachelor's and Master's degree in
about.educationEnd: with a specialization in software development from Palacky University's Faculty of Science in Olomouc. My academic background combined with years of real-world experience has shaped a pragmatic approach to building software.
about.current: Currently, I work as a programmer for
about.currentEnd: . Right now I'm most excited about Next.js, React, and leveraging AI agents for work. I'm a big fan of open-source technologies and try to contribute to their development.

items.description: Designing and developing DONACE.CZ and FUNDACE.CZ web applications in Next.js.
Building frontend solutions in React and TypeScript for enterprise clients.
Managing and developing internal systems on Linux using Java.

items.title: St. Maurice Church — Kiosk
items.subtitle: St. Maurice Parish Olomouc
items.description: Interactive touchscreen application running in St. Maurice Church and its tower in Olomouc. Presents the church's history, organs, community life, and donation options — featuring a 3D model viewer, photo gallery, and video content in two languages.

items.title: DONACE.CZ
items.subtitle: Teo via Foundation Fund
items.description: A full-stack donation and fundraising platform built as a monorepo with a public donation portal.

items.title: Sv. Moric Olomouc
items.subtitle: St. Maurice Parish Olomouc
items.description: Redesign and migration of the original parish website to modern technologies. A second website was also created for the St. Maurice organs, featuring an organ pipe adoption application.

items.title: Okno do Praxe
items.subtitle: Palacky University Olomouc
items.description: Job fair website for Palacky University connecting employers and students. I continue to participate in preparing new editions of the event.

items.title: Colidocs
items.subtitle: Bachelor's thesis
items.description: A fork of Quickdocs with new design, GitHub authentication, and symbol usage examples. Exploring Lisp documentation.

items.title: Jedeme Online
items.subtitle: Project Jedeme v tom společně
items.description: Web application for the now-defunct project Jedeme v tom společně. The project aimed to engage seniors in retirement homes through competitive group physical activity — riding stationary bikes.

pricing.title: Project
pricing.description: Get a rough estimate for your project. Choose a base scope, add the features you need, and see the price update in real time.
pricing.disclaimer: This is a non-binding estimate for orientation purposes. The final price depends on the specific requirements and complexity of your project. Let's talk about the details — reach me at
pricing.designReady: I already have a complete design
pricing.designReadyHint: Figma, Sketch, or detailed mockups ready for implementation
pricing.nonprofitHint: Foundation, association, church, or other nonprofit

landing.name: Landing Page
landing.description: A single-page website perfect for product launches, events, or personal presentation. Responsive, fast, and focused on one clear goal.

business.name: Business Website
business.description: A multi-page website with structured content, responsive design, and a professional look. Ideal for companies, studios, or freelancers.

application.name: Web Application
application.description: An interactive application with dynamic content, user flows, and custom functionality. Think dashboards, portals, or booking systems.

corporate.name: Corporate System
corporate.description: A complex, enterprise-grade platform with multiple integrations, role-based access, and scalable architecture. Built for serious business needs.

contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? I'd love to help you bring your vision to life.
contact.legalNote: Sole proprietor registered in the Trade Register.
